app.name: Atlas
app.description: Explore localization knowledge of every country from scratch

dimensions.title: Explore by dimension
dimensions.subtitle: Pick a dimension to highlight related countries on the map

map.hint: Click any country to view localization knowledge · scroll to zoom · drag to pan
map.hintGlobe: Drag to rotate the globe · click a country for details
map.hintTerrain: Real terrain basemap · scroll to zoom · drag to pan · click a country for details
map.toggleAdmin: Show subdivisions: hover a country to show provincial/state capitals. Full province/state outlines and details are currently available for China and the United States only; more countries will be added later.

geo.title: Geography facts
geo.multiTz: This country spans multiple zones; shown for the capital's zone

insights.title: Fun metrics
insights.note: Fun educational metrics from authoritative public sources, for learning reference only.

resources.title: Localization learning resources
resources.intro: A curated set of free, professional resources for localization and internationalization (i18n): time zones, Unicode standards, languages & scripts, currency, units and electricity.
resources.disclaimer: All links are third-party sites for learning reference; availability is subject to each provider.

ai.inputPlaceholder: Ask a follow-up about the selection…
ai.emptyHint: Select any text on the page and click "Ask AI" to start.
ai.needConfig: AI is not configured yet. Please add your own API key in settings first.

settings.title: AI Settings
settings.desc: Enter your own OpenAI-compatible endpoint. The key is stored only in your current browser (localStorage) and is never uploaded or bundled into the site.
settings.step1: Pick any model service below; click its name to auto-fill the base URL and model.
settings.step2: Click ↗ to open its site, sign up and top up, then create an API key (most require a balance to call).
settings.step3: Paste the key below and save to start asking.
settings.getKey: Open site to get a key
settings.rechargeNote: Note: each service requires signing up and topping up on its own site.
settings.trialNote: This site offers {{limit}} free trials (sponsored by the developer).
settings.securityNote: 🔒 Security: this is a fully static site. Your key is stored only in your current browser (localStorage). It is NOT cleared on refresh or when navigating between pages, and stays available next time you visit in the same browser — you only need to re-enter it if you click Clear key, clear your browser cache, or switch device/browser.

about.title: About Atlas
about.intro: Atlas is a beginner-friendly website for learning world localization knowledge. Through an interactive world map it helps you understand each country's currency, language, religion, government, unique holidays and capital.
about.dataDesc: Base country data (currency, language, capital, region, flag) is compiled from open datasets; religion, government and unique holidays are curated from public authoritative sources. For learning reference only — corrections welcome.
features: Interactive world map — click to explore any country
Six dimensions with categorized display and reverse filtering
Text-selection AI Q&A (using your own API key)
about.disclaimer: Disclaimer: content is for learning and cultural reference only and represents no official stance.

province.title: {{country}} · Province-level regions
province.subtitle: Click any province / autonomous region / municipality to explore dialects, ethnic groups and more
province.pickHint: Click a region on the map to see details

news.title: Recent highlights
news.needConfig: This feature uses your own AI. Please add your API key in settings first.
news.disclaimer: Compiled by AI from public reports, for learning reference only; defer to official media.

common.creator: Ian Chen
common.poweredByTip: AI Q&A and smart search on this site are powered by this model

coffee.intro: If this little site helped you, feel free to buy me a coffee ☕ Pick a tier and enjoy my fancy thank-you first!
coffee.noPlatform: (No payment platform configured yet — I'll take the thought, thank you! 🥰)
coffee.disclaimer: Donations are fully optional and unlock nothing — every bit of kindness fuels the next update 💪

contact.label: Contact
contact.tip: Click to copy email: contact / report a bug / suggestions

stats.likeTip: Like this site (tap as many times as you want, no login)

aiSearch.noCountry: This question doesn't map to a specific country — try rephrasing.
aiSearch.needConfig: AI search needs an API key (or a free trial). You can also just type a country name.
aiSearch.trialExceeded: 🥺 The developer's wallet is empty — trials used up. Add your own API key in settings.
aiSearch.error: AI search hit an error. Try again later or use keyword search.
